creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 173021
Patch to the ports tree

This patch updates devel/visualparadigm to build 20160702.

The upstream project doesn't provide information for minor updates.

I also added the port to the 'java' category since it is effectively completely written in java.

I also stripped a binary to remove a warning.

* portlint -AC: OK
     WARN: Makefile: Consider defining LICENSE. (none of the options is applicable IMHO)

* make test: OK

* poudriere {9.3,10.1,10.3}{i386,amd64}: OK
